calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Morgan appeared via CourtCall for Cadence Bank (petitioner).

Mr. Morgan stated that he filed declaration addressing the procedural issues, that one was filed on August 07, 2023 and the other on December 05, 2023, that permission was not required to transfer the funds to Texas, and that administrator in San Francisco did not require compensation. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Visiting Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate For This Matter
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Morgan, via Zoom, for Cadence Bank, N.A., Personal Representative.

Counsel reports that a petition is almost complete but there have been delays with a property located in Hayward which had been occupied but is now vacant. However, a title issue has recently been discovered and separate counsel is working on that issue and once the title issue is resolved and the Hayward property is sold, the petition will be filed. The court confirms with counsel that net proceeds of the sale of real properties in this matter have been transferred to Cadence Bank, N.A., in Texas. The court reminds counsel regarding the defect in verification and advises counsel to address the issue.

The matters are continued to Dec-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

Petition To Distribute Net Proceeds From Sales Of Real Property To Sister State Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate For This Matter
Off Calendar Feb-16-2022 Continued To Jun-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Morgan, via CourtCall, for Cadence Bank, N.A.

The court queries counsel regarding whether the estate is ready to close. Mr. Morgan reports that two (2) of three (3) real properties have sold and the third, the property located in Hayward, is being prepared for sale. The court queries counsel if he intends to obtain waivers of account. Mr. Morgan reports that he doesn't believe that he will and requests a six-month continuance. The court advises counsel that it will grant a continuance for four months and will be expecting at least a Petition for Approval of Status of Administration if the estate is not ready to close by then.

The Status on Close of Estate and Petition to Distribute, etc., are continued to Jun-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: J. Jeung. Not reported.

Petition To Distribute Net Proceeds From Sales Of Real Property To Sister State Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Jul-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Morgan, via CourtCall, for Cadence Bank, N.A. Administrator.

The court at the outset queries counsel regarding why his client has yet to verify the petition. Counsel reports that he was unaware that the petition was unverified. Counsel advises the court that there is a Status hearing scheduled in this matter for July 26, 2021, and requests a continuance of today's hearing to then and confirms that a verification to the petition should be filed by then.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Distribute Net Proceeds, etc., is continued to July 26, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Morgan, via CourtCall, counsel for Cadence Bank, Administrator.

At the outset, the court advises counsel that courtesy copies of the petition and proposed order were not provided and, the notice of hearing was not submitted on a proper, mandatory Judicial Council form. Counsel apologizes for the oversight and advises that the issue will be resolved in a timely matter. After further discussion this matter is contined to MAY-03-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204 for the status of the submission of the previously mentioned documents by no later than APR-19-2021.
